#   * Remove `managed = False` lines if you wish to allow Django to create, modify, and delete the table
# Feel free to rename the models, but don't rename db_table values or field names.
from django.db import models


class AcademicPeriods(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=50)
    university = models.ForeignKey('Universities', models.DO_NOTHING)
    period_type = models.ForeignKey('PeriodTypes', models.DO_NOTHING)
    start_month = models.IntegerField()
    end_month = models.IntegerField()
    order = models.IntegerField()
    create_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    create_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'academic_periods'


class AuditLogs(models.Model):
    user_id = models.IntegerField(blank=True, null=True)
    table_name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    record_id = models.IntegerField(blank=True, null=True)
    action = models.CharField(max_length=6)
    former_data = models.JSONField()
    new_data = models.JSONField(blank=True, null=True)
    ip_address = models.CharField(max_length=45, blank=True, null=True)
    user_agent = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField()

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'audit_logs'

    subjects = models.ForeignKey('Subjects', models.DO_NOTHING)
    careers = models.ForeignKey('Careers', models.DO_NOTHING)
    period_number = models.CharField(max_length=45)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'career_subjects'


class Careers(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    university = models.ForeignKey('Universities', models.DO_NOTHING)
    short_name = models.CharField(max_length=20, blank=True, null=True)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=50)
    total_periods = models.IntegerField()
    status = models.IntegerField()
    create_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    create_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'careers'


class ClassroomCareers(models.Model):
    pk = models.CompositePrimaryKey('id', 'careers_id', 'classrooms_id')
    id = models.AutoField()
    careers = models.ForeignKey(Careers, models.DO_NOTHING)
    classrooms = models.ForeignKey('Classrooms', models.DO_NOTHING)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'classroom_careers'


class ClassroomTypes(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    description = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    status = models.IntegerField()
    create_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    create_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'classroom_types'


class Classrooms(models.Model):
    pk = models.CompositePrimaryKey('id', 'universities_id')
    id = models.AutoField()
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    classroom_type = models.ForeignKey(ClassroomTypes, models.DO_NOTHING)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=20, blank=True, null=True)
    floor = models.IntegerField(blank=True, null=True)
    building = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    building_code = models.CharField(max_length=20, blank=True, null=True)
    is_restricted = models.IntegerField()
    status = models.IntegerField()
    create_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    create_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    universities = models.ForeignKey('Universities', models.DO_NOTHING)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'classrooms'

class Groups(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=45)
    career = models.ForeignKey(Careers, models.DO_NOTHING)
    period_number = models.IntegerField()

    status = models.IntegerField()

    create_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    create_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'groups'

    image_name = models.CharField(max_length=45)
    mime_type = models.CharField(max_length=45)
    extension = models.CharField(max_length=10)
    sha256 = models.CharField(max_length=64)
    file_size = models.IntegerField()
    data = models.TextField()
    create_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    create_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'images'

class Subjects(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    short_name = models.CharField(max_length=10, blank=True, null=True)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    description = models.CharField(max_length=45, blank=True, null=True)
    hours_per_week = models.IntegerField()
    color = models.ForeignKey(Colors, models.DO_NOTHING)
    is_mandatory = models.IntegerField()
    status = models.IntegerField()
    create_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    create_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'subjects'

    teachers = models.ForeignKey(Teachers, models.DO_NOTHING)
    universities = models.ForeignKey('Universities', models.DO_NOTHING)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'teachers_universities'


class Universities(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    short_name = models.CharField(max_length=10, blank=True, null=True)
    image = models.ForeignKey(Images, models.DO_NOTHING)
    user = models.ForeignKey('Users', models.DO_NOTHING)
    start_time = models.TimeField()
    end_time = models.TimeField()
    status = models.IntegerField()
    create_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    create_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'universities'


class Users(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    surname = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    last_name = models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, null=True)
    email = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    password = models.CharField(max_length=255)
    status = models.IntegerField()
    role = models.ForeignKey(Roles, models.DO_NOTHING)
    selected_university = models.ForeignKey(Universities, models.DO_NOTHING)
    create_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    create_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    update_by = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'users'
